reviews.comment:
Deberían tener dos personas en el despacho de combustibles, sin importar día y hora siempre has largas colas de ambos lados y solo un naftero atendiendo. El resto de los servicios es excelente.

(Translated by Google)
They should have two people at the fuel station; regardless of the day or time, there are always long lines on both sides and only one attendant working. The rest of the service is excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1N2JiMm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre total. 1 hora en espera para cargar con vehículos adelante. Gente q carga NAFTA en bidones (algo q está prohibido) sin espera y retrasa aún más a los hacemos fila para cargar. El inflador de gomas ubicado en un lugar de difícil acceso. Deberían aumentar surtidores o empleados con todo lo q taquillan a diario.

(Translated by Google)
A total disaster. An hour-long wait to load vehicles ahead of us. People refuel in gasoline cans (something that's prohibited) without waiting, further delaying those in line to refuel. The tire pump is located in a difficult-to-reach area. They should increase the number of pumps or staff, considering all the ticket sales they receive every day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURadzgtN3Z3RRAB
